description_long: This apartment building is a mid-rise urban structure with a mix of red brick and beige stone facades, featuring six stories above ground. The front facade is characterized by vertically aligned windows, a prominent red awning above the main entrance, and street-level landscaping with small trees. The building's roof is flat, with visible rooftop structures and mechanical units. The rear and side facades are simpler, with fewer windows and a more utilitarian appearance, while the main facade is more decorative and inviting. The building is flanked by sidewalks and is situated among other urban structures, suggesting it is part of a city block. The overall design is functional yet aesthetically balanced, typical of contemporary urban apartment buildings.
description: A six-story urban apartment building with red brick and beige stone facades, vertically aligned windows, and a prominent street-level entrance with landscaping.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a red awning, vertically aligned windows, and street-level landscaping with trees.
description_view_1: The left-side view highlights the building's beige stone facade, minimal windows, and adjacent urban structures.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a flat roof with rooftop structures and a simpler, less decorative facade.
description_view_3: The right-side view displays a large expanse of red brick with minimal windows and a utilitarian appearance.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are vertically aligned in regular columns on the front facade, with consistent spacing and symmetry. Side and rear facades have fewer, more irregularly spaced windows.
